title: Nakhon Si Thammarat、Nakhon Si Thammarat — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Nakhon Si Thammarat、Nakhon Si Thammarat的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Nakhon Si Thammarat是Nakhon Si Thammarat的一個城市，人口約120,000。An ancient southern city with a rich history, stunning temples, and one of the lowest costs of living in Thailand, ideal for those seeking authentic Thai culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
